channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Treasury defends CGT changes that could impact individual share investors
item.description: The Australian Treasury has responded to criticism regarding proposed changes to the capital gains tax (CGT), which are part of Treasurer Jim Chalmers' budget. According to the Australian Financial Re...

item.title: ISKCON to Provide Nutritious Meals to Patients at Government Wenlock Hospital Starting June 1
item.description: From 1st June, ISKCON will begin serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner to patients at the Government Wenlock Hospital in Mangaluru, as announced by the Minister for Health and Family Welfare, Dinesh Gu...

item.title: Trump explains absence from Donald Trump Jr.'s wedding, citing government duties
item.description: President Donald Trump announced on social media that he would not attend the wedding of his son, Donald Trump Jr., and his fiancée, Bettina Anderson, citing responsibilities related to the government...

item.title: David Alaba to depart Real Madrid as contract ends
item.description: David Alaba, the Austrian defender, don confirm say him go leave Real Madrid at the end of this season as him contract don reach expiry. The 33-year-old player don dey with the Spanish side for five y...

item.title: Guy Garvey on Robert Smith, new Elbow album, and support for grassroots music venues
item.description: Guy Garvey, frontman of Elbow, spoke to NME at the 2026 Ivor Novello Awards about his friendship with Robert Smith of The Cure and the band’s plans for a new album. Garvey described Smith as a “wonder...

item.title: WHO warns Congo faces very high national risk of Ebola outbreak
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has raised the risk of the Bundibugyo strain of Ebola spreading across the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to a 'very high' level nationally. This strain does no...

item.title: Michael Carrick Appointed Permanent Manchester United Manager After Strong Interim Performance
item.description: Michael Carrick has been named the permanent manager of Manchester United after doing a very good job as interim coach. The former player took over in January when the team was struggling in the middl...

item.title: Ben Peng’s Nimbus Vase Highlights Flowers as Artful Objects
item.description: Designer Ben Peng has introduced the Nimbus Vase, a creative and minimalist piece that elevates floral arrangements into a small, thoughtful display. The design features a simple circular metallic dis...

item.title: Pep Guardiola’s Tactical Legacy and Impact on English Football
item.description: Since arriving at Manchester City in 2016, Pep Guardiola has profoundly reshaped English football through his innovative tactical approach. Despite initial scepticism, especially following a heavy def...

item.title: Thika Businessman Wins Case After Auctioneer Illegally Sells His Trucks
item.description: The Auctioneers Licensing Board has suspended Eliud Chai Wambu of Chador Auctioneers for six months following the illegal sale of two trucks owned by Thika businessman Rufus Kiretai Gichuki. Investiga...

item.title: Maa Behen Hindi Comedy Trailer Featuring Madhuri Dixit to Release on Netflix
item.description: The latest Hindi comedy film 'Maa Behen', directed by Suresh Triveni, has released its trailer, giving viewers a glimpse into a story full of humour, chaos, and unusual situations. The movie revolves ...

item.title: UNDP Advises Tanzania to Build Stronger Economy Facing World Challenges
item.description: The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) has told Tanzania to work hard on making its economy stronger because of big problems happening around the world. During a meeting in Dar es Salaam, exp...

item.title: Pre-1834 Greenland Inuit Sealskin Whaling Suit Preserved at Denmark's National Museum
item.description: A remarkable artifact from Greenland's Inuit heritage, a sealskin whaling suit crafted before 1834, offers insight into traditional Arctic survival techniques. This historical garment, currently house...

item.title: Janis Joplin and Big Brother and the Holding Company at the 1968 Newport Folk Festival
item.description: Janis Joplin’s performance with Big Brother and the Holding Company at the 1968 Newport Folk Festival on July 27 marked a significant moment in the event’s history. The band was on the cusp of major s...

item.title: Isabela Vice Mayor Jeryll Respicio Charged for Allegedly Inciting Sedition
item.description: A municipal vice mayor from Reina Mercedes, Isabela, Jeryll Harold Respicio, is currently facing legal charges for allegedly inciting sedition and rebellion, along with unlawful use of publications an...

item.title: EEDC launches SuperEdge billing system for better customer service
item.description: The Enugu Electricity Distribution Company (EEDC) don complete and deploy their integrated billing platform called SuperEdge. This new system go improve how dem dey handle both prepaid and postpaid el...

item.title: U.S. Lawmakers Propose Ban on License Plate Tracking Outside Tolling
item.description: U.S. lawmakers have introduced a bipartisan amendment aiming to restrict the use of automated license plate readers (ALPRs) to tolling purposes only. Sponsored by Republican Representative Scott Perry...

item.title: PM to review major road projects improving traffic and trade in Iringa
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba is set to start a two-day visit to Iringa Region to inspect development projects worth over Sh102.7 billion. Key projects include the seven-kilometre Iringa Bypass co...

item.title: Prominent entertainer and co-accused face charges over teen shooting and kidnapping
item.description: Prominent businessman and entertainer Mlindelwa 'Man B' Tyekana appeared in KuGompo City Magistrate’s Court on Friday for his first bail hearing in a serious case involving the shooting of a 16-year-o...

item.title: DA requests investigation into alleged irregularities in eThekwini soup kitchen programme
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) in eThekwini has formally requested the Public Protector to investigate alleged irregularities in the municipality’s soup kitchen programme. The concern centres on claims ...
